title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 27 February 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Correction is a good buying opportunity; accumulate 320-350
recommendations.detail: Said the recent correction is giving a good opportunity to buy and there is no need to panic. All dairy stocks benefit now that import/trade-deal fears (NZ, US, EU) have passed; efficient low-debt dairy companies will rise. One of the better bets to buy; at current levels it corrects and accumulates between 320 to 350.

recommendations.note: Corrected from top, now attractive; buy slowly
recommendations.detail: Having corrected from the top, the stock now looks attractive at current price, with good December results. He said definitely buy slowly.

recommendations.note: Good selection; start in tranches
recommendations.detail: Asked about Polycab, NetWeb and Airtel together. He said the stock selection is good, so start buying little by little in tranches (branches).

recommendations.note: Good selection; start in tranches
recommendations.detail: Part of the Polycab/NetWeb/Airtel question. He said the stock selection is good, so start buying little by little in tranches.

recommendations.note: Good selection; start in tranches
recommendations.detail: Part of the Polycab/NetWeb/Airtel question. He said the stock selection is good, so start buying little by little in tranches.

recommendations.note: Lot of churning post-merger; hold, no fresh buying
recommendations.detail: Said there is a lot of churning in the stock because Sequent Scientific has changed its name and became Vyash after mergers. He would hold; as of now there is no need to buy fresh.

recommendations.note: Hospital stocks on better footing; hold
recommendations.detail: Said hold. All hospital stocks are on a better footing; hospitals are one sector FIIs buy on and off, and large major hospitals across India are moving into institutional (FII/PE) hands. Definitely hold KIMS.

recommendations.note: Defense 'noise' not justified by results; hold, await Q result
recommendations.detail: Said hold what you have. A lot of noise was created around it being a defense company getting orders, but results did not justify it. It is a ~100-PE stock with negligible profits, so valuation is steep; only 'buy on noise'. Hold for now and watch the next quarter's result.

recommendations.note: Hype to reality; top line stabilizing; hold
recommendations.detail: Said the stock has come from hype to reality. The top line is stabilizing; the last result was slightly a disappointment and it has come into the 52-week low, but it is in a niche segment. He would hold on to Saint DLM as of now.

recommendations.note: Dull but steady long-term/high-dividend; no multibagger
recommendations.detail: Called it a dull counter but a steady-returns, long-term counter. Do not expect any multibagger returns. For extreme long-term holding and high dividend, LIC Housing is OK.

recommendations.note: Sell/exit on rallies; gold-lending tailwind fading
recommendations.detail: Said sell on rallies, given time. Their business grew in the last two quarters partly on gold-lending, which will now reduce; the business is concentrated in suburbs and tier-2 towns. The stock has already run up a lot, so booking profits or exiting on rallies is better even if not in profit.

recommendations.note: Lower-top/lower-bottom since failing 1000; sell on rallies
recommendations.detail: Said since it could not cross 1,000 after the third-quarter result, it remains in a lower-top, lower-bottom trend. The Q2 blockbuster result will not repeat in Q3 or Q4. As of now it is a stock to sell on any rallies.

recommendations.note: Speculative counter; exit on rallies
recommendations.detail: Said exit on rallies, no doubt. The stock did not work against expectations; it gets on-and-off volumes because it is a speculative, trader-favorite counter, nothing more. A weak stock to exit on rallies.

recommendations.note: Loss-making; avoid; only large paper names
recommendations.detail: Said it is avoidable because it is a loss-making company. If at all one must be in the paper industry, be only in a large company such as TNPL, JK or ITC. Exit.

recommendations.note: Not a great stock; distribution visible
recommendations.detail: Said repeatedly that Trident is not a great stock. The textile space has been a bit active after the US deal, but more distribution is visible in the stock, which must be observed.

recommendations.note: Near 52-wk low, last result flat; watch
recommendations.detail: Said it is trading at lower levels near its 52-week low and the last result was flat. Unless there are changes such as amine prices rising, the stock will likely stay flat in the short term; otherwise watch.

recommendations.note: Only a dark-horse bet
recommendations.detail: Among Balaji Amines / Renuka Sugars / Trident, he said Renuka is only a dark-horse bet. That's it.

recommendations.note: Data-center theme; dark-horse bet
recommendations.detail: On a data-center basket (NetWeb, ETE Network, KRN Heat Exchanger, Orient Technology, Sterlite Technologies). He favors momentum / 52-week-high names in an uncertain market. He named Sterlite Tech as a dark-horse bet.

recommendations.note: Niche cooling/refrigeration; near 52-wk high
recommendations.detail: From the data-center basket, KRN Heat Exchanger makes cooling systems and caters to refrigeration in a niche segment; it is in hype and near its 52-week high. He suggested it if the investor can follow it easily; usually he picks momentum stocks near 52-week highs when the market is uncertain.

recommendations.note: Speculative bet post block deal; SL 110
recommendations.detail: After the ~Rs 8,000 cr block deal, he noted last time the stock ran from below 100 to 150 over six months. It is a high-PE stock but the placement was done successfully. As a speculative bet, buying with a stop loss at 110 could give returns; watch if the post-block-deal pattern repeats.

recommendations.note: Hold for dividend; target rates far off
recommendations.detail: For a viewer holding NHPC (bought ~100) and IRFC (~175), he said enjoy the dividend and keep holding; the target rates will take a lot of time to come.

recommendations.note: Hold for dividend; 175 far off
recommendations.detail: Said enjoy the dividend and keep holding; the rate of 175 rupees won't come soon, it has to come someday far off.
